title: Autonomous Scientific Discovery via Iterative Meta-Reflection
innovation_summary: Autonomous Scientific Discovery via Iterative Meta-Reflection: We introduce DiscoPER, an autonomous large language model-powered framework that conducts open-ended research by dynamically generating and executing code to explore datasets without pre-specified research objectives.
